title: 无尽扫雷模拟器
description:
Massive Endless Maps for Stress Relief Break the board limits of classic Minesweeper with infinitely expanding maps. Clearing mines tile by tile is perfect for perfectionists. Tidying up the entire grid melts stress away completely — ideal for casual downtime at work.

Quick Number Click Mode, Double the Fun Skip tedious right-click flagging. Click numbers to reveal tiles instantly. Smooth controls greatly boost your efficiency. Clearing large areas in one go doubles your enjoyment instantly.

Freely Switch Between Various Color Themes Swap multiple visual themes at will. Tired of the same look after long play? Switch hues with one click to regain freshness, so you never get bored.

Mine Strikes Come With Fun Trivia No need to feel upset when hitting a mine. A pop-up will show interesting Minesweeper facts. Take a short break to learn handy tips, then reset and start a new round.

ESC Boss Key for Instant Window Hide A lifesaver for office gamers! Press ESC to minimize the window right away. Stay calm during unexpected checks and play with total peace of mind.

Secret Gameplay: Test Mouse Precision & Train Coordination It works as a free DPI tester! Precise tile clicks continuously sharpen your clicking accuracy and reaction speed. Friendly reminder: avoid rapid clicking for hours to prevent wrist soreness and tenosynovitis.
description_short: Infinite Minesweeper Simulator offers unlimited huge maps based on classic Minesweeper. Great for stress relief and casual breaks. No time limits, perfect for perfectionists, new players and veteran fans to play freely anytime.
